subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Tununganunga-ke byambo byo twingijisha kunungakanya nangwa kukumankanya
topics: milanguluko, bipelu nangwa byambo kupichila mu ñambilo nangwa nembelo ya mulaka.
Nabiji ne, kabiji, nangwa, onkao mambo, ne bino.
